query_intent: Find customers whose web sales growth from 2001 to 2002 exceeds their store sales growth over the same years, requiring positive 2001 totals in both channels.

dag_nodes.intent: Build per-customer yearly totals for store and web channels from extended list price minus discount amount, tagging each row with channel sale type.
Self-join 2001 and 2002 totals for both channels by customer, require positive baseline totals, compare web vs store growth ratios, and return matching customer identity fields.
